title: 💼 Hiring: Senior Product Operations Manager - Binance
description_short:
📍 Remote (Global) | 🕐 2 hours ago - May 16, 2026 | 💰 Competitive | 🧑‍💻 Senior · full-time | 🔗 Product Operations, Data Analysis

Binance is hiring a Senior Product Operations Mana...
description_full:
📍 Remote (Global) | 🕐 2 hours ago - May 16, 2026 | 💰 Competitive | 🧑‍💻 Senior · full-time | 🔗 Product Operations, Data Analysis

Binance is hiring a Senior Product Operations Manager to drive product development and execution based on user feedback and business objectives in a leading blockchain ecosystem.

Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange.

📋 Responsibilities include:
- Identify product optimization opportunities and define product requirements based on user feedback, data analysis, and business growth objectives.
- Collaborate closely with Product, Design, and Engineering teams to drive end-to-end product delivery.
- Own GTM strategy for new feature launches, including user communication, launch promotion, and performance tracking.
- Plan and execute product campaigns to boost user engagement and activity.
- Develop and implement growth strategies to drive core metric improvements.
- Define, track, and analyze core product metrics and surface actionable insights for optimization.
- Handle day-to-day operations including content governance, user experience monitoring, and cross-functional coordination.

🔑 Requirements:
- 5+ years of experience in product operations or a related role; crypto/Web3 industry experience required (trading product experience is a strong plus).
- Strong data analysis skills with hands-on experience using analytics tools (SQL is a plus).
- Fluent in both written and spoken English as a working language.
- Excellent cross-functional collaboration and communication skills; able to drive projects effectively in a fast-paced environment.
- Proven ability to independently plan and execute growth initiatives.
- Experience with social or content platforms is a plus.

💡 Perks & Benefits:
- Shape the future with the world’s leading blockchain ecosystem.
- Collaborate with world-class talent in a user-centric global organization with a flat structure.
- Tackle unique, fast-paced projects with autonomy in an innovative environment.
- Thrive in a results-driven workplace with opportunities for career growth and continuous learning.
- Competitive salary and company benefits.
- Work-from-home arrangement (the arrangement may vary depending on the work nature of the business team).

📩 To apply: Submit your application here: https://jobs.lever.co/binance/13365c0b-76dc-4774-b82d-c33d40262063
